title: Suggestion: recipe sends email to multiple contacts in ONE email
excerpt: Suggestion: Automation recipes that can send an email to two (or more) recipients on the same email (either CC’d or both in the “TO” field) rather than sending separate emails to each of the recipients (as it does now).

posts.author: dpat (Dan Patty)
posts.cookedHtml: Suggestion: Automation recipes that can send an email to two (or more) recipients on the same email (either CC’d or both in the “TO” field) rather than sending separate emails to each of the recipients (as it does now).
